title: girlfriend of steel game and translation patch
display_title: girlfriend of steel game and translation patch
wikitext:
[]: girlfriend of steel game and translation patch             Quote Post by gammerboy1999 » Thu Oct 10, 2013 3:11 pm i don't really know if i can ask this without getting banned but does anyone know where to find a working GOS copy online and the english translation patch for it???

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 10, 2013 5:10 pm Seeing as how there isn't any actual gameplay, you're probably better off just watching a playthrough. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k2Q-7aqYJis

[]:             Quote Post by gammerboy1999 » Thu Oct 10, 2013 7:11 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k2Q-7aqYJis

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 10, 2013 7:14 pm gammerboy1999 wrote: ok.. um first off this is in spanish

[]:             Quote Post by tootiredtoriot » Thu Oct 10, 2013 10:44 pm better burn than a superheated hatch door.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Oct 11, 2013 11:56 am I'm watching this now, Mana a bit forward isn't she?

[]:             Quote Post by gammerboy1999 » Fri Oct 11, 2013 8:36 pm the thing about video is that it does'nt really agree with my internet connection

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 13, 2013 7:42 pm gammerboy1999 wrote: the thing about video is that it does'nt really agree with my internet connection

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Oct 25, 2013 11:18 am The video is now kaput. I actually obtained an English version of the game years ago but have yet to install and play it and my source is long dead.
